message.content:
# Source Inventory: Small-Business Navigation in Richmond

## Comprehensive Resource Guide for Starting a Business in Richmond, Virginia

The following source inventory consolidates all relevant materials for entrepreneurs and small-business owners navigating the Richmond business setup process. This inventory organizes municipal, state, and community resources by function and format, providing a complete reference for compliance, licensing, permitting, and operational requirements.

## Primary Departmental Resources and Webpages

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| www.rva.gov/finance/business | City of Richmond Department of Finance | Departmental landing page | Web portal | Entry point for all business tax and licensing information |
| www.rva.gov/finance/bpol-tax | City of Richmond Department of Finance | Business licensing requirements | Web page with FAQs | Primary resource for BPOL tax requirements and license renewal |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review | City of Richmond Planning & Development Review | Departmental homepage | Web portal | Zoning, permits, and development review information |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/zoning-administration | City of Richmond Zoning Administration | Zoning services | Web page | Certificate of Zoning Compliance applications and zoning verification |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/permits-and-inspections | City of Richmond Permits & Inspections | Permit services overview | Web page | Building permits, inspections, and application timelines |
| www.rva.gov/fire-emergency-services/permits | City of Richmond Fire Department | Fire safety permits | Web page with forms | Fire permits, hazardous materials, and food truck compliance |
| www.rva.gov/minority-business/resources | Office of Minority Business Development | MBE resources and programs | Web page | Minority-owned business certification and development support |
| www.rva.gov/economic-development/about-us | Department of Economic Development | Economic development services | Web page with directory | Business investment, job creation, and development incentives |
| www.rva.gov/citizen-service-and-response/about-rva-311 | City of Richmond RVA 311 | Service request and customer support | Web page | Non-emergency service requests and information routing |
| www.tax.virginia.gov/register-business-virginia | Virginia Department of Taxation | Business registration | Web page with online portal | State tax registration and compliance |
| www.sbsd.virginia.gov | Virginia Department of Small Business and Supplier Diversity | State business support | Web portal | Certification programs, financing, and business development |
| bos.sbsd.virginia.gov/Home/BusinessResources | Virginia Business One Stop | Centralized business resources | Web portal | Comprehensive business setup guidance and resource directory |
| www.sba.gov/district/virginia | U.S. Small Business Administration Virginia District | Federal business support | Web portal with events | SBA funding, counseling, and federal contracting |

## Online Portals and Digital Filing Systems

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rvapay.rva.gov/bpp | City of Richmond Department of Finance | Business Portal | Web application | Business Personal Property and BPOL tax filing and payment |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/online-permit-portal | City of Richmond Permits & Inspections | Online Permit Portal | Web application | Building permits, zoning compliance, and inspection requests |
| permits.virginia.gov/Permit/Search | Virginia Department | Permit Transparency Portal | Web application | Statewide permit application tracking and status |
| cis.scc.virginia.gov | Virginia State Corporation Commission | Corporate Information System | Web application | Business formation filings and assumed name registration |
| rvalibrary.org/richmond-room/small-business-resources | Richmond Public Library | Business resource database | Web portal | Access to legal forms, business planning templates, and online learning |

## Official Forms and Application Documents (PDF)

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2020-09/NEW%20BUSINESS%20LICENSE%20CHECKLIST%20OF%20DOCUMENTS.pdf | City of Richmond Finance | Business license requirements checklist | PDF form | Verification of all required documentation before business license issuance |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2023-01/2023%20NewBusinessLicenseApplication.pdf | City of Richmond Finance | New Business License Application | PDF form | Initial business license application (Form BLI-23) |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2022-01/RenewalBusinessLicense2022.pdf | City of Richmond Finance | Business License Renewal Form | PDF form | Annual BPOL and business tangible personal property renewal |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/Planning/PDFDocuments/Forms/OccupancyAPP.pdf | City of Richmond Planning & Development | Certificate of Occupancy Application | PDF form | Applications for new business occupancy approval (HCO application) |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/City%20of%20Richmond%20-%20How%20to%20apply%20for%20a%20CZC-Residential_0.pdf | City of Richmond Zoning Administration | Certificate of Zoning Compliance Guide | PDF with instructions | Step-by-step guidance for CZC applications for home occupations |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2024-01/Customer%20Guide%20-%20COs%20and%20HCOs.pdf | City of Richmond Permits & Inspections | Certificate of Occupancy Customer Guide | PDF guide | Comprehensive guide to CO and HCO processes, fees, and requirements |
| rva.gov/sites/default/files/2025-07/RESMP%20Permit%20Process%20Quick%20Sheet_Final_6.25.2025.pdf | City of Richmond Water Resources | Stormwater Permit Process | PDF quick reference | Richmond Erosion & Stormwater Management Program (RESMP) permit requirements |
| www.vdh.virginia.gov/content/uploads/sites/119/2023/12/Opening-a-Food-Establishment-Procedures-Checklist-Final-Inspection-Checklist-RCHD.pdf | Richmond City Health District | Food Establishment Opening Checklist | PDF checklist | Health permit requirements and procedures for food service businesses |
| www.vdh.virginia.gov/content/uploads/sites/119/2023/12/Mobile-Unit-GuidelinesOEHS-2017.pdf | Richmond City Health District | Mobile Food Unit Guidelines | PDF guide | Requirements for mobile food establishments and food trucks |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2020-09/Fire%20Truck%20Safety%20Checklist.pdf | City of Richmond Fire Department | Food Truck Fire Safety Checklist | PDF checklist | Fire safety and equipment requirements for mobile food operations |
| sccvirginiagov-lb01-production.terminalfour.net/media/sccvirginiagov-home/business-home/forms-and-fees/scc591-70in.pdf | Virginia State Corporation Commission | Certificate of Assumed or Fictitious Name Instructions | PDF form | Instructions for registering business trade names and fictitious names |
| www.dpor.virginia.gov/sites/default/files/boards/Contractors/A501-27EXINFO.pdf | Virginia Department of Professional & Occupational Regulation | Contractor License Requirements | PDF document | Qualified individual requirements for contractor licensing classifications |
| workcomp.virginia.gov/sites/default/files/documents/Workers-Compensation-Information-Sheet-for-Employers.pdf | Virginia Workers' Compensation Commission | Workers' Compensation Information | PDF fact sheet | Employer requirements for workers' compensation insurance coverage |
| www.rva.gov/sites/default/files/2024-02/PDR%20Website%20Staff%20Contact%20Directory%20-%20February%2013%202024.pdf | City of Richmond Planning & Development Review | PDR Staff Directory | PDF directory | Contact information for all planning and zoning staff members |

## Regulatory and Ordinance Documents

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| library.municode.com/va/richmond/codes/code_of_ordinances | City of Richmond | Municipal Code and Ordinances | Web-based code library | Zoning regulations, licensing requirements, and business ordinances |
| library.municode.com/ca/richmond/codes/code_of_ordinances?nodeId=ARTIXHE_CH9.38MAESSE | Richmond County Code | Home Occupations Regulations | Web code section | Specific regulatory requirements for home-based businesses (Note: County code example) |

## Specialized Business Type Guidance and Resources

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/short-term-rentals | City of Richmond Zoning Administration | Short-Term Rental Regulations | Web page | STR licensing requirements, occupancy limits, and compliance rules |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/sidewalk-cafes | City of Richmond Planning & Development | Sidewalk Café Requirements | Web page with brochures | Guidelines for outdoor dining and sidewalk café permits |
| data.richmondgov.com/Economic-Growth/Business-Licenses/hy5d-7dcv | City of Richmond Open Data Portal | Business License Data | Web database | Public dataset of active business licenses in Richmond |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/faq | City of Richmond Planning & Development | Planning FAQ | Web page | Frequently asked questions about permits, zoning, and home occupations |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/city-center | City of Richmond Planning & Development | City Center Innovation District Plan | Web page with presentations | Development framework and rezoning information for downtown innovation district |

## Statewide and Federal Business Support Resources

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| www.tax.virginia.gov/businesses | Virginia Department of Taxation | General business tax information | Web portal | Tax registration, filing requirements, and compliance |
| www.dpor.virginia.gov | Virginia Department of Professional & Occupational Regulation | Licensed professions directory | Web portal | Professional licensing requirements for regulated occupations |
| www.dpor.virginia.gov/ProfessionsAndOccupations | DPOR Professions Index | Regulated professions list | Web page | Complete listing of all regulated professions in Virginia |
| go.chamberrva.com/list/searchalpha/a | Richmond Chamber of Commerce | Business Directory | Web database | Searchable directory of Richmond-area businesses |
| www.vdh.virginia.gov/richmond-city/environmental-health/ | Richmond City Health District | Environmental Health Division | Web page | Food safety, lodging permits, and environmental inspections |
| www.abc.virginia.gov | Virginia Alcoholic Beverage Control Authority | Alcohol License Information | Web portal | ABC licensing requirements and application procedures |

## Community and Nonprofit Support Organizations

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rvalibrary.org/richmond-room/small-business-resources | Richmond Public Library | Business resource guide | Web page | Free business planning resources, legal forms, and research databases |

## Contact and Customer Service Resources

| URL | Owner | Content Type | Format | Likely Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| www.rva.gov/finance | City of Richmond Finance Department | Finance homepage | Web portal with contact info | Entry point for all tax, licensing, and payment inquiries |
| www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/contact-information | City of Richmond Planning & Development | Contact directory | Web page | Department phone numbers, emails, and office locations |
| www.rva.gov/finance/directory | City of Richmond Finance Directory | Finance department contacts | Web page with directory | Specific contacts by area (real estate, BPOL, collections, etc.) |
| RVA311.com | City of Richmond | Service request portal | Web application | 24/7 non-emergency service request submission and tracking |

## Information Summary Table: Recommended Resource Navigation by Business Phase

The following table organizes resources by the typical stages of business formation and operation in Richmond:

| Business Phase | Primary Resources | Key Contacts | Estimated Timeline |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Pre-Formation Planning** | Virginia Business One Stop (bos.sbsd.virginia.gov), SBA Virginia (sba.gov/district/virginia), Richmond Library Business Resources (rvalibrary.org) | Virginia SBSD (804-786-6585), SBA Richmond (804-771-2400) | Varies by complexity |
| **Business Formation** | Virginia State Corporation Commission (cis.scc.virginia.gov), Virginia Tax Registration (tax.virginia.gov/register-business-virginia), IRS EIN application | VSCC Clerk's Office (804-371-9733), Virginia Tax (804-367-8031) | 1-2 weeks |
| **Zoning & Location Verification** | RVA Online Permit Portal (www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/online-permit-portal), Zoning Administration (www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/zoning-administration) | Zoning Administration (804-646-6340), RVA 311 (804-646-7000) | 1-2 weeks |
| **Permits & Inspections** | Online Permit Portal (www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/online-permit-portal), Building Permits (www.rva.gov/planning-development-review/permits-and-inspections), Fire Permits (www.rva.gov/fire-emergency-services/permits) | Permits & Inspections (804-646-4169), Fire Marshal (804-646-4436) | 2-6 weeks depending on complexity |
| **Business Licensing** | RVA Business Portal (rvapay.rva.gov/bpp), BPOL Tax Page (www.rva.gov/finance/bpol-tax), New Business Checklist (PDF reference) | Finance Department (804-646-7000), RVA 311 (3-1-1 locally) | 1-2 weeks after compliance |
| **Specialized Requirements** | Industry-specific portals (Food: www.vdh.virginia.gov, Alcohol: www.abc.virginia.gov, Contractors: www.dpor.virginia.gov) | Health District (804-205-3912), ABC (804-213-4400), DPOR (804-367-8511) | Varies by industry |
| **Ongoing Compliance** | RVA Business Portal (annual renewal), RVA 311 (issue reporting), Zoning Administration (ongoing compliance) | Finance Department, Planning & Development Review | Annual renewal by March 1 |

This source inventory provides a comprehensive reference for small-business navigation in Richmond. The materials span formation, licensing, permitting, compliance, and ongoing operational support across municipal, state, and federal agencies. Most resources are accessible online through web portals, with telephone support available through RVA 311 (804-646-7000 or dial 3-1-1 locally) during business hours Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
